title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Vedantu International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Vedantu International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Vedantu International Enterprises in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu International Enterprises:
Vedantu International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu International Enterprises!
